heading_content_part: Privacy PolicyCallBlockerPrivacyPolicy2016年7月22日星期五Call Blocker Privacy PolicyThis document clarifies how User data and any sensitive information is handled in the App.Read contactsCall Blocker needs to read contacts and show them in a list so that you can choose to add numbers to Black List or White List.Read call logsCall Blocker needs to read call logs and show them in a list so that you can choose to add numbers to Black List or White List.Call phone

You can call the number in the list of Blocked logs in Call Blocker.Read phone state & Answer phone callsGet the ringing state of the phone to make blocking decision configured by the user.Others(Write External Storage, Access Network State, Access Wifi StateThese are used to display the ads.

AdvertisingCookies, unique device identifiers for advertising (Google Advertiser ID or IDFA, for example) and Usage DataGoogle Mobile Ads SDK is used to serve ads in the application. Please refer Google Privacy Policy in https://policies.google.com/privacyGoogle may use the advertising ID from your device to generate interests and demographics (for example, 'sports enthusiasts'). Interests, demographics, and other data may be used to serve better targeted ads to you. You can view and edit your interests and demographics, or opt out of personalized ads from https://www.google.com/settings/ads
